title: Answer jaboostin's Congress tools question in thread

log.context: Answer jaboostin's Congress tools question in thread

Done. Here's what I found and posted:

**Finding:** Congress personas have no tool access whatsoever. All four model backends (Claude CLI, Claude SDK/Haiku, Grok, Gemini) use single-turn text completions with just a system prompt and user message. No `--allowedTools`, no `tools` parameter, no function calling. The relevant code is in `/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts` lines 138-310.
